jobs.title: Channel Sales Manager
jobs.content: <p><strong>Channel Sales Manager</strong></p><p>Cribl is the dominant observability-data-pipeline platform pioneered around the vendor-agnostic event-routing data model.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Cribl Stream
jobs.content: <p>Lead Cribl Stream's event-routing engine across the platform stack & SIEM ecosystem.</p>
